zh.lifeSummary: 當Matilda Ridel於大約1110年出生在英國時，她的父親Philip de Ridell33歲，母親Christiana de Soulis33歲。她和Pharamus de Boulogne至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1184年在法國i萊-德-福朗斯豪-德-布洛-比藍古特享年75歲。

nameMeanings.name: Ridel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Ridgell  . This form of the surname is not found in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Matilda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

variants.name: Mathilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Matilda Ridel was born about 1110, in England, her father, Philip de Ridell, was 33 and her mother, Christiana de Soulis, was 33. She had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with Pharamus de Boulogne. She died in 1184, in Boulogne-Billancourt, Hauts-de-Seine, Île-de-France, France, at the age of 75.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Matilda Ridel est née environ 1110, à Angleterre, son père, Philip de Ridell, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Christiana de Soulis, avait 33 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles avec Pharamus de Boulogne. Elle est décédée en 1184, à Boulogne-Billancourt, Hauts-de-Seine, Île-de-France, France, à l’âge de 75 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Matilda Ridel um 1110 in England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Philip de Ridell 33 und ihre Mutter Christiana de Soulis 33. Sie hatte mit Pharamus de Boulogne mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1184 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Boulogne-Billancourt, Hauts-de-Seine, Île-de-France, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Matilda Ridel è nata il circa 1110 nel England, sua padre, Philip de Ridell, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Christiana de Soulis, aveva 33 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie con Pharamus de Boulogne. Morì nel 1184, nel Boulogne-Billancourt, Hauts-de-Seine, Île-de-France, Francia, all'età di 75 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Matilda Ridelが約1110年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Philip de Ridellは33歳，母Christiana de Soulisは33歳であった。彼女はPharamus de Boulogneとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1184年にフランスiレ-デ-フランスハウトス-デ-セアインボウログネ-ビランコウルトで75歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Matilda Ridel(이)가 대략 1110년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Philip de Ridell(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Christiana de Soulis(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 Pharamus de Boulogne(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1184년 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 하츠-데-세이인 부로그니-빌랭쿠르트에서 75세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Matilda Ridel nasceu aproximadamente 1110, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Philip de Ridell, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Christiana de Soulis, tinha 33 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas com Pharamus de Boulogne. Ela faleceu em 1184, em Boulogne-Billancourt, Hauts-de-Seine, Île-de-France, França, com 75 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Matilda Ridel родилась около 1110 г. в местности Англия, её отцу по имени Philip de Ridell было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Christiana de Soulis, 33. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери от Pharamus de Boulogne. Она умерла в 1184 г. в местности боулогне-билланкоурт, хауц-де-син, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 75 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Matilda Ridel nació aproximadamente 1110, en Inglaterra, su papá, Philip de Ridell, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Christiana de Soulis, tenía 33 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas con Pharamus de Boulogne. Murió en 1184, en Boulogne-Billancourt, Hauts-de-Seine, Île-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 75 años.
